claim: The universal sensorium hooks (SessionStart/PostCompact gen_spec, UserPromptSubmit emit_cipher+claude_md_diff_watch+attention_hook, PreToolUse graph-guard, Stop context_producer) shall live in a committed project settings.json generated by a setup tool with commands portable via $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR, never only in the personal git-ignored settings.local.json.
blocked_on: blocked on the setup_hooks tool (Planned in internal/methodology/tools_data.go)
